title: ÜSSAM (Strategic Studies Application and Research Center) Internship Application
content:
ÜSSAM (Strategic Studies Application and Research Center) Internship Application

Strategic Studies Application and Research Center (ÜSSAM) Internship Directive

/assets/uploads/uam/38/content/files/stratejik-arastirmalar-merkezi-staj-yonergesi.docx

Due to the high number of applications for our internship program for the April-July 2024 period, we are accepting new applications for the May-August 2024 period. Candidates who want to apply for an internship for the May-August 2024 period must submit their application forms to ÜSSAM office until 29.04.2024 at the latest.
